prompt: A crane lifts steel beams while a ground robot bolts them in place. The ground robot begins only after crane placement is confirmed. If a human enters the safety zone, both robots must halt within 5 seconds.

If a human enters the safety zone, GroundBot  must halt within 5 seconds
